description: Build the pacsomatic-compatible samplesheet CSV (patient,sample,status,bam,pbi) for a matched tumor/normal pair. Tumor row status=1, normal row status=0.
rules: read-only — writes samplesheet.csv only, never executes the pipeline
two rows: tumor (status 1) then normal (status 0), sharing the same patient id
columns are fixed: patient,sample,status,bam,pbi (pbi optional, blank when unset)
usage: Set PATIENT_ID, TUMOR_SAMPLE_ID, NORMAL_SAMPLE_ID, TUMOR_BAM, NORMAL_BAM (optional TUMOR_PBI, NORMAL_PBI). Output: samplesheet.csv.
limitation: Does not validate that BAM files exist or that ids are space-free; use the dry-run perk for full input validation.
